title: Ovation HT203 2200W Brushed Stainless Steel & Black Cordless Pyramid Kettle with 1.8L Capacity & Boil Dry Protection
features: Ovation HT203 Cordless Pyramid Kettle 1.8L - Brushed Stainless Steel & Black 2200w
1.8 Litre capacity cordless pyramid kettle with 360° swivel base
Transparent water level indicator and LED illuminated On/Off switch
2200w Concealed heating element with integrated Strix control boil dry proctection for complete peace of mind
Comes with Ovation's comprehensive 3 Year Warranty, after customer registration.
description: From the manufacturer Traditional yet Elegent Peace of Mind The Ovation HT205 packs many safety feartures including: Utilising STRIX Controller Technology - Unrivalled component quality Integrated Boil Dry protection Cool Touch Handle Fused 3 Pin UK Plug Ovation's comprehensive 3 Year manufacturers warrany. (Product reg. required) Ovation HT205 Stainless Steel Cordless Pyramid Kettle - 1.8Ltr- 2200w Stylish, Functional. Effortless Bring your kitchen to life with the stylish yet functional Ovation HT205 Kettle. Striking in shape, vibrant in Red and accented by contrasting Black and Chrome. Boasting features such as large water capacity, Illuminated LED on/off switch and Quick boil Technology, the HT205 Kettle allows you to serve the whole family. Large 1.8ltr water capacity Easy View water Level Window LED illuminated on/off Switch 360° Swivel Base 2200w Concealed Element Bring your Kitchen to life Traditional Pyramid Style Accented Spout, Handle, Lid and Trim Easy View Water Level Window Easy Fill Lid Cordless Freedom Don't be held back by cables and cords. the HT205 is housed on a 360° Swivel Base for freedom of use and with cord storage keeps your worktops tidy. Handle with care Cool touch handle and direction spout for the perfect pour. Ovation Designed for the way you live.
